task: edu Day 0 safety gate streamline and Day 1 transition

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion reporting requires requirement-to-evidence mapping, real runtime or user-facing verification, completion guard evidence, and exact residual risk reporting.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard; Red Team is not automatic unless CEO explicitly requests it.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Remove the redundant Day 0 cards below '오늘의 순서' so the user only checks the 'AI를 쓰기 전에 먼저 알아야 할 것' concept cards.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx removes the Day 0 schedule preview and extra understand_* safety checklist render from SafetyOrientationBlock.

requirements_checklist.requirement: After concept checks and optional LLM questions, allow transition into Day 1 practice instead of forcing extra non-practice checks.
requirements_checklist.evidence: SafetyOrientationBlock ready state now requires only foundation concept card checks; confirmSafetyOrientation sends confirmed_concept_ids; backend _edu_vp_safety_confirmation_from_event accepts required safety_concept_* ids.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Remove confusing '질문만 먼저 저장' button because draft persistence already keeps the question context.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/edu-app/src/components/TrainingScreen.tsx removes onSaveQuestions prop, saveSafetyQuestions handler, and the visible button. updateConceptFeedback now writes the latest feedback into the local stage draft immediately.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Answer whether Day 1 has a concrete curriculum/UX when users move there.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Existing Day 1 implementation remains in _edu_vp_build_day1 and Day1DetailPreview with schedule_blocks, sample_materials, tutorial_steps, scenario_bank, checklist, prompt template, and proof artifact UX.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not claim cross-LLM red_team_clear when review resources fail.
requirements_checklist.evidence: docs/reviews/edu_training/red_team_claude_day0_day1_gate_20260628.md records Claude CLI no-output timeout; docs/reviews/edu_training/red_team_copilot_day0_day1_gate_20260628.md records Copilot quota failure.
